revision.text:
{{ #ifeq: {{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 10 }} | 0=甲 | 1=乙 | 2=丙 | 3=丁 | 4=戊 | 5=己 | 6=庚 | 7=辛 | 8=壬 | 9=癸 }}{{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 12 }} | 0=子 | 1=丑 | 2=寅 | 3=卯 | 4=辰 | 5=巳 | 6=午 | 7=未 | 8=申 | 9=酉 | 10=戌 | 11=亥 }} | {{{1|}}} | 1 | 0 }}<noinclude>
[[Category:Solar term templates| ]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{ #ifeq: {{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 10 }} | 0=甲 | 1=乙 | 2=丙 | 3=丁 | 4=戊 | 5=己 | 6=庚 | 7=辛 | 8=壬 | 9=癸 }}{{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 12 }} | 0=子 | 1=丑 | 2=寅 | 3=卯 | 4=辰 | 5=巳 | 6=午 | 7=未 | 8=申 | 9=酉 | 10=戌 | 11=亥 }} | {{{1|}}} | {{{2|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}<noinclude>
[[Category:Solar term templates| ]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

[[Category:Solar term templates| ]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[zh-classical:Template:節氣表格單元/if year]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Robot - Removing category Templates using ParserFunctions per [[WP:CFD|CFD]] at [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2008 Month 0]].
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{ #ifeq: {{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 10 }} | 0=甲 | 1=乙 | 2=丙 | 3=丁 | 4=戊 | 5=己 | 6=庚 | 7=辛 | 8=壬 | 9=癸 }}{{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 12 }} | 0=子 | 1=丑 | 2=寅 | 3=卯 | 4=辰 | 5=巳 | 6=午 | 7=未 | 8=申 | 9=酉 | 10=戌 | 11=亥 }} | {{{1|}}} | {{{2|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>

revision.comment: [[User:addbot|Bot]]: Migrating interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q14388113]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 8 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Solar_term/if_year]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{ #ifeq: {{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 10 }} | 0=甲 | 1=乙 | 2=丙 | 3=丁 | 4=戊 | 5=己 | 6=庚 | 7=辛 | 8=壬 | 9=癸 }}{{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 12 }} | 0=子 | 1=丑 | 2=寅 | 3=卯 | 4=辰 | 5=巳 | 6=午 | 7=未 | 8=申 | 9=酉 | 10=戌 | 11=亥 }} | {{{1|}}} | {{{2|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
[[Category:Solar term templates| ]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{ #ifeq: {{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 10 }} | 0=甲 | 1=乙 | 2=丙 | 3=丁 | 4=戊 | 5=己 | 6=庚 | 7=辛 | 8=壬 | 9=癸 }}{{ #switch: {{ #expr: ({{ #time: Y | -34 days }} - 4) mod 12 }} | 0=子 | 1=丑 | 2=寅 | 3=卯 | 4=辰 | 5=巳 | 6=午 | 7=未 | 8=申 | 9=酉 | 10=戌 | 11=亥 }} | {{{1|}}} | {{{2|}}} | {{{3|}}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
